name: Visual Translate by Vozo
tagline: Translate on-screen video text without rebuilding your visuals from scratch
problem: Businesses distributing video content across multiple language markets face costly, time-consuming rework when text overlays, titles, and captions need translating. Recreating visuals from source files is often impractical, especially when originals are unavailable. Visual Translate detects and replaces on-screen text directly within the video, preserving the original design and layout.
useCases: Localising marketing and promotional videos for international markets
Translating training or onboarding videos for multilingual workforces
Adapting product demo videos for regional sales teams without designer involvement
Repurposing social media video content across different language audiences
